intro:
pata nahi kaise start karu…
bas itna hai ki tu thodi alag si lagti hai.
memories: tu jab bolti hai ‘mai jyada bolti hu’… honestly mujhe kabhi problem nahi hui.
kabhi kabhi lagta hai tu simple si baat bhi thodi interesting bana deti hai.
wo ‘so gya kya’ messages… jaise tu check karti rehti hai… idk, achha lagta hai.
tu jab random ‘acha sun’ se start karti hai… lagta hai ab kuch aayega 😂
tu khud apni voice ko normal bolti hai… but maine itni baar suni hai ki ab wohi normal achha lagta hai.
kabhi tu ekdum serious baat bol deti hai… aur next moment ‘are yaar’… balance ajeeb sa hai but nice.
tu jab future ki baat casually kar deti hai… jaise woh normal hai… wo thoda hit karta hai.
jab tu bolti hai ‘tu jaisa hai waisa hi acha hai’… uska reply abhi tak nahi mila mujhe.
kabhi kabhi tu bas ‘hmm’ bolti hai… aur fir bhi lagta hai convo chal rahi hai.
tu jab bolti hai tu busy hai… fir bhi reply kar leti hai… woh effort noticeable hai.
aur haan… tu jab ‘pagal hai kya’ bolti hai… usme bhi thoda sa pyaar hota hai shayad.
idk kaise… but tere sath baat karte karte time ka pata nahi chalta… fir baad me realise hota hai.
constellation: starting me lagta tha bas normal baat hai… ab lagta hai thodi alag hai.
shayad tu notice nahi karti… par tu cheeze thodi easy bana deti hai.
aur haan… tu thodi different hai… aur shayad isi wajah se achhi lagti hai.
final:
bas… ye sab bolna tha.
bina reason ke nahi likha hai.
